name: Battlewasp - Sting the Poison
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｂ・Ｆ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ビー・フォース</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>毒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>針</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のニードル
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Battlewasp" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Battlewasp - Sting the Poison". (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 other Insect monster, then target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Battlewasp - Sting the Poison" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Battlewasp" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Battlewasp - Sting the Poison". (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 other Insect monster, then target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Battlewasp - Sting the Poison" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: Collection Pack: Duelist of Revolution Version

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
